raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tam Nabbagam ne bija
wiſſai nenecka/ ka weens weentige
Jehriſch/ ko wiſſch bij pirzis un
usaudſinajs/ ka tas pee winna
bij usaudsis/ un wiſſch turreja to
itt ka sawus Behrnuß/ tas ehde
no winna Kunmoſa/ un dſehre no
winna Rikkeru/ un gulleja win
na Klehpi/ un bija winnam ta/
ka weena Meita.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad nu tam baggatam
Wihran weens Zetta-Wihrs at-
gahje/ tad wiſſch ne gribbeja no
fawahn Awim un no faweem
Wehrcheem xeint/ ko labbu
preeſſch to Zetta-Wihru fataifiht/
kas pee winna bija nahzis/ un
wiſſch nehme ta nabbaga Wihr-
ra Jehrinu/un fataifija to preeſſch
to Wihru / kas pee winna bij
nahzis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad apsknitahs Dahwide
us to Wihrn warren tohti/ un
fazzija us Nahtanu: ( Tik tee-
scham ka) tas KUNGS dsib-
wo/ tas Wihrs/kas to irr dar-
rijs/ irr to Nahwi pelntijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un to Jehru buhs tam
tſchetrfahrtigt atdoht / tapehz ka
wiſſch scho Leetu irr darrijs / un
ka wiſſch ne irr ſaudſeis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Nahtans us
Dahwidu: Tu eſſi tas Wihrs.
Ta takka tas KUNGS Israëta
Deeivs : Es eſmu tew par keh-
nimu twadijs pahr Israëlu / un
Es eſmu tew ispeſtijs no Saula
Rohkas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Es eſmu tew tawa
Kunga Namunu dewis/ un tawa
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kunga Seewas tawá Klehpi/
eſmu tew arridsan Israëka
Juhta Namunu dewis. Un
tas wehl master/tad es tcho
to wehl gribbu peelikt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kapehz eſſi tu tad ta KUD
GA Wahrdn pahr Galwu la
dis/ un ſaunu padarrijs preekf
winna Azzim? Urtjasfu to Eetite
eſſi tu nokawis ar Sohbinnu/
winna Seewu tew par Seeu
nehmis/ bet winnu eſſi tu nok
wis ar Ammona Behrnu So
binu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Nu tad tas Sohbins
atſtahfees no tawa Nammanu
ſcham / tapehz ka tu manni e
nizzinajs/ un Urijafa ta Eetite
Seewu nehmis/ ka tatawa Se
wa buhtu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Taſakka tas KUNG
Reds/ es weddiſchu pahr te
Nelatini/ is tawa Namma/
Remſchu tawas Seewas preekf
tawahm Azzim/un dohſchu taſ
tawam Tuwakam / tas gulle
pee tawahm Seewahm paſc
Saulê.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo tu eſſi to fleppeni da
rijs/ bet es darriſchu ſcho Lee
preeſſch wiſſa Israëta paſc
Saulê.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Dahwids
Nahtanu : Es eſmu prett
KUNGU grehkojis: Un Na-
tans fazzija us Dahwidu: Ta-
irr nu tas KUNGS arri taw-
Grehkus atnehmis/ tew ne bu-
nomirt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tomehr tapehz / ka
"
